items.title: Dems Rig Virginia Vote With Misleading Ballot Language Equating Gerrymandering Push To ‘Fairness’
items.description: Some Virginians have noticed what appears to be a lack of institutional effort by Republicans in battling the referendum.

items.title: NC Election Board Agrees To Fix Thousands Of Voter Registrations Lacking Required ID Numbers
items.description: The North Carolina State Election Board agreed to no longer register voters missing required information.

items.title: NYT Accidentally Confesses There’s A Left-Wing Judicial Coup Against Trump
items.description: As admitted by Toobin, Democrat-appointed judges have become a critical feature of the left's evolving lawfare against Trump and his voters.

items.title: Stephen Colbert’s Nightly Democrat Extravaganza Collides With FCC’s ‘Equal Time’ Rule
items.description: The crybaby late-night host insists he's a victim of political pressure, but he's been a long-time abuser of the nation's broadcast airwaves.

items.title: While Democrats’ Anti-ICE Fury Escalates, Americans Show They Want Immigration Laws Enforced
items.description: As protests and riots against ICE grow more common, formal state and local cooperation with ICE grows far more common.
